admin_code.description: Admin-mode gate code on Home. Lifts the maxPlayers cap from 5 to 500. Obfuscation only, no real auth. Compiled fallback: AdminCode.value / AdminCode.VALUE.

found_code_max_wrong_attempts.description: Number of wrong found-code entries a hunter may make before a cooldown kicks in. Compiled fallback: AppConstants.codeMaxWrongAttempts / CODE_MAX_WRONG_ATTEMPTS.

found_code_cooldown_seconds.description: Cooldown duration in seconds after a hunter hits the wrong-attempts limit. Stored in seconds for cross-platform parity. Compiled fallback: AppConstants.codeCooldownSeconds (iOS) / CODE_COOLDOWN_MS / 1000 (Android).

default_initial_radius_meters.description: Starting zone radius the creation wizard seeds. Overwritten by the size picker (followTheChicken) or recomputed from pins (stayInTheZone). Compiled fallback: AppConstants.defaultInitialRadiusMeters (iOS) / DEFAULT_INITIAL_RADIUS (Android).

version.description: PouleParty runtime-tunable game constants (admin code, found-code cooldown, default zone radius).
